email_open_followup: The appointment remains open. After the appointment is confirmed, we will send a separate calendar confirmation.
email_attachment_copy: You will find the .ics file in the attachment.
email_withdrawal_copy: the right to withdraw applies until the service has been fully performed, in line with Article 38 point 1 of the Consumer Rights Act. During purchase, we collected cumulative consent to start providing the service before the withdrawal period ends and a statement about losing that right after full performance.
